ogTitle: Cootharaba vs Cooya Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cootharaba and Cooya Beach.
heading: Cootharaba vs Cooya Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cootharaba, Queensland and Cooya Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooya Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Cootharaba (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cootharaba or Cooya Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cootharaba has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Cooya Beach scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cootharaba scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Cooya Beach scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cootharaba or Cooya Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooya Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
